Second Layer Aggregator

For merchants who are second layer aggregators and wants to use 7-Eleven Connect OTC, please reach out to Partnerships @Mica Rose Nopuente @Ian Carlo Arias.

7/11 Biller Type Confirmation

7-11 Biller Type:

  • Collections: for all merchants whose use 7-11 use is for collecting money (money in)

  • Lending: concludes for all merchants whose use case is for loan repayments (Not disbursements, but just Loan Repayments)

  • Digital bank: for User Top Up in their wallet (the likes of GoTyme, Tonik, Maya, GrabPay)

Prohibited

  • Payment Facilitator

  • Payment Solutions

  • Entities engaged in Gambling/ Online Gaming and Online Casino/Casino

  • Merchants selling substances designed to mimic illegal drugs

  • Merchants selling drug paraphernalia

  • Merchants selling Pornography and other obscene materials

  • Merchants selling illegal products or services

  • Merchants selling military/police supplies

  • Merchants selling or offering services related to fake references or ID-providing services;

  • Merchants selling goods in violation of Intellectual property or proprietary rights

  • infringement

  • Merchants selling or engaged in the business of goods in relation to Sec. 118 of Republic Act No. 10863 (Customs Modernization and Tariff Act);

  • Entities offering false propaganda to get rich

  • E-Sabong

Types of Onboarding

Type

Description

7 Connect

  • (the same one with 7-11 BUX that we have before)

  • merchant give a payment code to the end user

  • end user can go to 7-11 cashier to pay directly

7-11 CLIQQ

  • merchant give a payment code to the end user

  • end user goes to CLIQQ machine or use the CLIQQ app to convert payment code into barcode

  • end user take barcode to the cashier to pay

7 CONNECT

Onboarding Process

Category

No

Steps

Owner

Merchant requests for CA

1

Merchant request for 7-eleven CONNECT channel activation through Sales / CS

Merchant

Sales / CS to inform MO

2

Sales / CS will inform MO via slack in #mo-ph-request to request for 7-eleven channel activation.

Details to provide:

  • Biller Name:

  • Total Monthly Transaction Volume: ₱xxx

  • Monthly Transaction Count: xxx

  • Ave. Basket Size: ₱xxx

  • Biller Type: Collections / Repayments / Bank Deposits

  • Area of Coverage: Nationwide

Note: Kindly ensure that biller name is correct since it takes additional SLA for changing the biller name.

Sales

MO will process application

3

MO will create a 7-eleven Accreditation Letter - Xendit Aggregator per merchant, have it signed by YY and submit to PSC PIC for processing along with Product Catalog docs.

Subject: (XENDIT) 7 Eleven Connect Onboarding - Batch X

Hi Krizyl & 7-Eleven Team,

Please see attached Accreditation Letter for the following merchants:

Kindly proceed onboarding with 7-eleven Connect.

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Xendit Merchant Ops PH

MO

7-eleven will process request

4

PSC team will process onboarding of merchants, and will provide a unique Item Code per merchant.

PSC

MO to activate

5

MO activates the channel vial Retool

Under Channel Activation

  • Input BID & choose Xendit Philippines Inc - Next

  • Payment Method : OVER_THE_COUNTER

    • To choose the correct channel is by looking from partner’s feedback :

      • If partner gave 1 item then choose only [Single Item Code] 7ELEVEN

      • If partner gave 2 Items then input one by one based on PSC DESCRIPTION : [Multiple Item Code] 7ELEVEN PHP1 - PHP 20,000 and [Multiple Item Code] 7ELEVEN PHP20,000.01 - PHP 50,000

  • Input PLU CODE on Item Code based on partner’s feedback & Biller Name based on PSC DESCRIPTION

  • Check if everything already correct then click Activate

  • Channel has been activated

MO

CA team to activate

6

CA team will acknowledge and activate 7-eleven Connect for merchant

CA

MO to inform Sales / CS

7

Once activated, MO will inform Sales / CS that 7-eleven Connect has been activated so they can inform the merchant.

MO to update tracker

MO

END

Activation Process via Retool

Step

Description

Owner

Receive feedback from partner

Detail feedback :

  • PLU #

  • Item Code

  • PSC Description
    PSC Share

  • Category

Partner (7- Eleven)

MO activate merchant using retool

  • Fill in merchant’s BID & Transaction entity

  • Click next

  • Choose Payment Method - Over The Counter

  • For channel type, since 7-eleven gives us 2 types of feedback, so we fill in based on partner feedback.


    MO choose either:

  • [Single Item Code] 7ELEVEN for this type of feedback


MO choose this channel type:

  • [Multiple Item Code] 7ELEVEN PHP1 - PHP20,000

  • [Multiple Item Code] 7ELEVEN PHP20,000.01 - PHP50,000

  • Click next and follow for the steps

MO

  • Fill in this field

  • PLU CODE as Item code & Biller name (PSC Description)

  • Click Activate

  • 7- Eleven for merchant now live
